query: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_count, SUM(CASE WHEN description = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as is_null FROM places WHERE type IN ('island', 'activity_spot')
